ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the location */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the location */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the location is active */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., restaurant, park) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_history_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "location1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first location in the relationship */,
  "location2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second location in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., proximity, containment) */,
  "relationship_strength" REAL /* Strength of the relationship (e.g., proximity distance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_relationships_location1_id FOREIGN KEY ("location1_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_relationships_location2_id FOREIGN KEY ("location2_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_bounds" (
  "bound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boundary */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being bounded */,
  "bound_type" TEXT /* Type of boundary (e.g., circle, polygon) */,
  "bound_value" REAL /* Value of the boundary (e.g., radius, coordinates) */,
  "bound_precision" REAL /* Precision of the boundary (e.g., meters) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the boundary was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the boundary was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_bounds_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being mapped */,
  "map_service" TEXT /* Name of the external mapping service */,
  "map_url" TEXT /* URL of the map */,
  "map_provider" TEXT /* Mapping service provider (e.g., Google, OpenStreetMap) */,
  "map_zoom" INTEGER /* Default zoom level for the map */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the map was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the map was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maps_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_category" TEXT /* Category of the tag (e.g., food, entertainment) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_tags_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being imaged */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., photo, logo) */,
  "image_category" TEXT /* Category of the image (e.g., food, entertainment) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_images_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_reviews_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being tracked */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., views, visits) */,
  "stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date for which the statistic applies */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_stats_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
